mapper.sql: id, title, content, notice_type, status, is_top, publisher_id, publisher_name, publish_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notice WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM notice WHERE deleted = 0 AND title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND notice_type = #{noticeType} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY is_top DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM notice WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, notice_type, status, is_top, publisher_id, publisher_name, publish_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{noticeType}, #{status}, #{isTop}, #{publisherId}, #{publisherName}, #{publishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title=#{title}, content=#{content}, notice_type=#{noticeType}, status=#{status}, is_top=#{isTop}, publish_time=#{publishTime}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE notice SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notice SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
UPDATE notice SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notice SET is_top = #{isTop} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notice WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND is_top = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
